meanings.definition: a representation by picture or portraiture

examples: The book portrays the actor as a selfish person
Goya wanted to portray his mistress, the Duchess of Alba

meanings.definition: assume or act the character of
examples: The actor portrays an elderly, lonely man

meanings.definition: represent abstractly, for example in a painting, drawing, or sculpture
examples: The father is portrayed as a good-looking man in this painting
